meta.title: Building a Form Store with Zustand
meta.excerpt: Create persistent form state with Zustand for multi-step forms

props.text: A multi-step form store needs: current step tracking, form data storage, navigation methods, and persistence.
Start with the TypeScript interface for your store.
Implement the store with persist middleware.

props.title: 📖 Explanation
props.body: The persist middleware automatically saves to localStorage and rehydrates on mount.
